suspension_rights.value: AUP breach, material breach/non-payment, security risk, trade-law risk; notice generally given but immediate suspension permitted

termination.value: Either party may terminate for convenience on 60 days' notice; 90-day post-termination data extraction window (for non-renewed services)
termination.citation: Either party may terminate this Agreement without cause on 60 days' notice

unilateral_modification.value: Microsoft may update Agreement; 60 days' notice for General Terms changes; SLA adverse material changes 90 days' notice
unilateral_modification.citation: Customer will be notified at least 60 days before changes take effect to these…

governing_law_disputes.value: Governing law: Washington State/US federal; venue varies (Customer HQ if Microsoft sues, King County WA or Ireland if Customer sues); no arbitration stated; no class waiver stated
governing_law_disputes.citation: governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Washington

liability.value: Cap: subscriptions = 12 months' fees; perpetual = amount paid; carveouts for confidentiality, IP, third-party claim defense; consequential/indirect damages waived
liability.citation: maximum, aggregate liability is the total amount of subscription fees Customer paid to use…

output_indemnity.value: Yes (Customer Copyright Commitment) for Covered Products, conditioned on safety systems enabled and no known infringement
output_indemnity.citation: Microsoft's obligation to defend Customer against third-party intellectual property claims
